title: Recursive Coding Agents - Raymond Weitekamp, OpenProse
summary: Raymond Weitekamp presents recursive language models that use inference-time compute patterns to improve coding agent performance and reliability. The approach maps recursion onto agent behavior for enhanced code generation and reasoning.
writeup: Raymond Weitekamp of OpenProse presents recursive language models that apply inference-time compute patterns to coding agents. The talk maps recursion onto agent behavior, with the goal of improving code generation and reasoning. The central claim is that this recursive structure raises both performance and reliability for coding tasks.
